name: DumitruIulian/IBM-Summer-School-
analysis_mermaid:
graph LR
    subgraph Frontend
    end
    subgraph Backend
        LibraryApplication[Library Application] --> BookController[Book Controller]
        BookController --> BookService[Book Service]
        BookService --> BookRepository[Book Repository]
        BookRepository --> Database[Database]
        BookService --> SecurityConfig[Security Config]
    end
    subgraph Database
    end
    subgraph Dependencies
        BookRepository --> BookRepositoryJPA[Book Repository JPA]
        BookService --> BookServiceJPA[Book Service JPA]
        SecurityConfig --> KeycloakRoleMapperConfig[Keycloak Role Mapper Config]
    end
    style Frontend fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style Backend fill:#ccc,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style Database fill:#aaa,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style Dependencies fill:#ddd,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px

analysis_hotspots.reason: Outdated or redundant data transfer object
